'''Glarret''' was an aged [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who worked as [[Xaverri]]'s assistant until [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] took over for him.
